# Simple timeout test

# Set very aggressive timeout
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=1s

# Test that quick operations work
exec echo "fast operation"
stdout 'fast operation'

# Test bash with aggressive timeout
env MCP_BASH_TIMEOUT=2s
bash 'echo "bash works"'
stdout 'bash works'

# Test multiple quick operations
exec echo "test1"
exec echo "test2"
exec echo "test3"
stdout 'test3'
